# Mark Ross Junkans — Author, Entrepreneur, Faith & Technology Speaker

> Christian author, entrepreneur, and advocate for business as mission. Partner in ventures spanning AI consultancy, international project development, the energy industry, coffee roasting, and cross-cultural Christian mission. Speaker on faith and technology, AI ethics for churches, and the persecuted church. 3x Ironman and ultrarunner. Based in Houston, Texas.

## Key Facts

- **Full Name:** Mark Ross Junkans
- **Location:** Houston, Texas
- **Roles:** Author, Entrepreneur, Speaker, AI Consultant, Pastor
- **Website:** https://markrossjunkans.com
- **Amazon Author:** https://www.amazon.com/stores/Mark-Ross-Junkans/author/B0GCXX63WC
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/markjunkans
- **X/Twitter:** https://x.com/mjunkans

## Pages

- [Home](https://markrossjunkans.com/): Author homepage — books, bio, speaking, and latest work at the intersection of faith, technology, and business
- [About](https://markrossjunkans.com/about): Full bio, ventures, social links — the story of a Christian entrepreneur living across multiple worlds
- [Books](https://markrossjunkans.com/books): All books by Mark Ross Junkans — faith and AI, daily devotionals, practical AI guides
- [Speaking & Media](https://markrossjunkans.com/speaking): Speaking topics and booking — faith and technology, AI ethics, business as mission, the persecuted church
- [Blog](https://markrossjunkans.com/blog): Articles on faith and AI, devotional life, business as mission, and endurance
- [Store](https://markrossjunkans.com/store): Digital resources — AI prompts for pastors, Notion templates for churches, AI guides
- [AI Prompts for Pastors](https://markrossjunkans.com/ai-prompts-for-pastors): 75+ ministry-specific AI prompts for sermon prep, pastoral care, admin, and outreach
- [Your AI Employee](https://markrossjunkans.com/your-ai-employee): 124-page guide to building a 24/7 personal AI assistant
- [Contact](https://markrossjunkans.com/contact): Speaking engagements, bulk book orders, AI consulting inquiries

## Books

1. **The Return of Mystery: Faith In An Age of Machines** (ISBN: 978-8-2955-3249-8) — What happens to faith when AI can preach, create, and seemingly think? An exploration arguing that the rise of AI might be an invitation back to wonder, awe, and mystery.
2. **3 Verses a Day: 30 Days to Deepen Your Relationship with God** — A simple daily devotional: three verses a day for 30 days. No fluff, just you, the Word, and space to listen. Based in the Gospel of John.
3. **3 Verses a Day: Trust in God** — A devotional on trusting God through scripture, especially when life doesn't make sense.
4. **Your AI Employee: How to Build a 24/7 Personal AI Assistant That Actually Does Things** — Step-by-step guide to building a personal AI assistant. 12 chapters, 30 templates, zero coding required. From the team at Advira.ai.

## Digital Products

- **AI Prompts for Pastors** — 75+ ready-to-use AI prompts for sermon prep, pastoral care, admin, outreach, and devotion. Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini.
- **Church Admin Template** (Notion) — All-in-one Notion workspace for church management: sermons, members, events, budget, volunteers, tasks.
- **AI Ethics for Church Leaders** (Video Course) — 5-module video course on navigating AI with theological clarity and practical tools.

## Ventures & Organizations

- **[Advira.ai](https://advira.ai)** — AI consulting and implementation firm (Managing Partner)
- **[CrossCM](https://crosscm.org)** — Cross-cultural Christian mission organization focused on church planting and the persecuted church
- **Spur Coffee** — Specialty coffee roasting from East Africa
- **Flagship Resources** — Petroleum operations and international trade
- **PJIC** — International project development

## Speaking Topics

- Faith in an Age of AI
- The Return of Mystery
- Business as Mission
- The Uncompartmentalized Life
- Endurance & Leadership
- Raising Kids in a World of AI
- The Persecuted Church & the Western Call
- Pastoring in the Digital Age
- Starting Something From Nothing
- AI Ethics for Churches

## Knows About

Artificial Intelligence, Faith and Technology, Business as Mission, AI Ethics, Church Leadership, Entrepreneurship, Persecuted Church, Endurance Sports, Coffee Roasting, International Development, Petroleum Trading, Church Planting, Cross-Cultural Ministry, Daily Devotionals, Christian Writing, AI Tools for Pastors, AI Consulting, Ultrarunning, Ironman Triathlon

## Blog Posts

- [When AI Preaches Better Than Your Pastor](https://markrossjunkans.com/blog/when-ai-preaches-better-than-your-pastor) — What happens when a machine delivers a more polished sermon than a human? Exploring incarnation vs. AI content delivery.
- [The Devotional Habit That Changed Everything](https://markrossjunkans.com/blog/the-devotional-habit-that-changed-everything) — Three verses a day. No commentary, no study guides. A simple practice that transforms how you engage scripture.
- [Business as Mission: More Than a Slogan](https://markrossjunkans.com/blog/business-as-mission-more-than-a-slogan) — Lessons from running ventures across coffee, energy, AI, and missions. How business expands the kingdom.
- [What Ultramarathons Taught Me About Faith](https://markrossjunkans.com/blog/what-ultramarathons-taught-me-about-faith) — Endurance, suffering, the long middle. How running 50 miles parallels following Jesus.

## Contact

For speaking engagements, church bulk book orders, AI consulting, media inquiries, or general questions: https://markrossjunkans.com/contact
